name: ivanti_connect_secure
explanation: Ivanti Connect Secure is a logs-only vendor security tile. The spec only defines a `logs` template (TCP/UDP syslog listener on a user-supplied port) and ships no Agent metric check (`datadog_checks/ivanti_connect_secure/` contains only `__about__.py` and `__init__.py`, with no `<name>.py`). There is no upstream HTTP/JMX/OpenMetrics endpoint to discover; the Agent passively receives forwarded syslog from the Ivanti appliance. Auto-config in the network-probe sense does not apply — the appliance must be configured out-of-band to ship logs to the Agent's listener port chosen by the operator.
notes: Logs-only vendor security tile; no metric check. Same shape as other syslog-ingest tiles.
